use_codes.desc: TOPICAL TREATMENT OF INFLAMMATORY PAPULES AND PUSTULES OF MILD TO MODERATE ROSACEA
TOPICAL TREATMENT OF INFLAMMATORY PAPULES AND PUSTULES OF MILD TO MODERATE ROSACEA

indications.text:
Finacea (azelaic acid) Foam, 15% is indicated for topical treatment of the inflammatory papules and pustules of
mild to moderate rosacea.

moderate rosacea.
